overview: Bubba's 33 Roadie Training app with a patriotic Orientation layout for the Legendary Starts Here position.
features: Patriotic Orientation layout for the Legendary Starts Here position
Admin toggle to switch a position between Library and Orientation layouts
Hero sections for Mission, Core Values, Our Story, Operational Goals, and Priorities
Rules of the Road reference grid for remaining policy categories
Reads existing Library content — no data changes beyond a small layoutStyle field
